title: aphelia pumilio
intro: Aphelia pumilio is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. It is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Aphelia pumilio can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
